'''dathufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocebo|nocebo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocebo|nocebo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dathufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæthifith|dæthifith]] || [[word:dæthifij|dæthifij]] || [[word:dæthifish|dæthifish]] || [[word:dæthifi|dæthifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathuthufuth|dathuthufuth]] || [[word:dathuthufuj|dathuthufuj]] || [[word:dathuthufush|dathuthufush]] || [[word:dathuthufu|dathuthufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathufuth|dathufuth]] || [[word:dathufuj|dathufuj]] || [[word:dathufush|dathufush]] || [[word:dathufu|dathufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathuffuth|dathuffuth]] || [[word:dathuffuj|dathuffuj]] || [[word:dathuffush|dathuffush]] || [[word:dathuffuf|dathuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dathufuthu|dathufuthu]] || [[word:dathufuju|dathufuju]] || [[word:dathufushu|dathufushu]] || [[word:dathufuku|dathufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dathufuth|dathufuth]] || [[word:dathufuj|dathufuj]] || [[word:dathufush|dathufush]] || [[word:dathufu|dathufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dathufuthul|dathufuthul]] || [[word:dathufujul|dathufujul]] || [[word:dathufushul|dathufushul]] || [[word:dathufukul|dathufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dathufuthuthu|dathufuthuthu]] || [[word:dathufujuju|dathufujuju]] || [[word:dathufushushu|dathufushushu]] || [[word:dathufuku|dathufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dathufuthun|dathufuthun]] || [[word:dathufujun|dathufujun]] || [[word:dathufushun|dathufushun]] || [[word:dathufukun|dathufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dathufuthuoro|dathufuthuoro]] || [[word:dathufujuoro|dathufujuoro]] || [[word:dathufushuoro|dathufushuoro]] || [[word:dathufukuoro|dathufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
